THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GENEVA HVAC CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDDY'S PLUMBING CO. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,550.00, JANUARY 10, 2007 CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT AT 10:00 AM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
